name: hover-card
description: A hover/focus-triggered content-preview popover (WAI-ARIA APG Tooltip pattern). TWO cooperating partials: hover-card-trigger.jte wraps the trigger element; hover-card.jte is the floating panel. The panel content is fully server-rendered (no round-trip on open); hover-card.enhancer.ts owns show/hide timing, hover-grace delay, focus-open path, and Esc dismiss. role="tooltip" + aria-describedby + popover="manual" + CSS Anchor Positioning. No interactive children inside the card. CSP-clean, zero inline script.
docs: Copies two JTE partials and a CSS token file into your project. Call hover-card-trigger.jte around the trigger element and hover-card.jte for the card panel with matching cardId/id values. Install hover-card.enhancer.ts via installHoverCard(runtime) in your main.ts (or wire it through installAllFeatures once the coordinator registers it in index.ts). The card content must contain NO interactive children (links, buttons, form controls) — the APG Tooltip pattern is the a11y foundation and prohibits focusable elements inside the panel. For cards needing clickable children, use the popover component instead.
